strengths: Currently architecting production AI infrastructure (MCP frameworks and agentic workflows at re:cinq)—hands-on builder-level fluency with cutting-edge AI systems
20 years of full-stack and infrastructure engineering depth across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps domains
Founded and sustained GISCollective platform for 9+ years, demonstrating strategic thinking and ability to guide complex technical initiatives
concerns: AI/ML expertise is nascent (6 months direct experience) versus the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated products' the role prioritizes
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field, though holds CS degree meeting minimum education requirement
Limited evidence of strategic customer advisory or public thought leadership on cloud/AI adoption strategies
response.justification: Okonkwo brings 20 years of proven deep technical versatility and is currently hands-on with production AI infrastructure—working on MCP frameworks and agentic systems at re:cinq, directly addressing the role's AI focus. A 9-year track record founding and sustaining GISCollective demonstrates strategic thinking and ability to guide complex technical initiatives. The combination of strong foundational engineering breadth, current immersion in cutting-edge AI systems, and proven ability to rapidly learn new domains positions them as a technically credible builder-leader capable of integrating AI into broader system strategy—the critical perspective needed to advise on cloud and AI product differentiation.
